case_title: BONIFACIO CAP CHAVAC VS. ELVA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVAC, BONIFACIO CAP AS TO DEFENDANT ELVA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATALIE'S ANTIQUES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
